prompt:
Create a vertical cinematic composite portrait showing the same male person across exactly 6 life stages in one seamless family-lineage style image, arranged diagonally from lower left to upper right as if time is progressing upward. Use a South Asian male with dark hair, medium skin tone, and similar facial features at every age. Canvas: 3:4 portrait orientation, photorealistic, studio-quality, soft painterly background gradient from deep blue on the left to warm amber beige on the right, subtle mist/vignette around the lower edges. Composition: six full or half-body age versions overlap in depth, with the youngest in front at the bottom left and the oldest behind at the top right; each older version is larger and positioned slightly higher/right. The six visible stages must be: 1) Newborn Baby (0 months), swaddled in a thick white blanket at the bottom left, tiny head visible; 2) Toddler (1–2 years), sitting just above the baby, wearing a blue-and-white striped long-sleeve shirt; 3) Cheerful School Kid (6–8 years), standing behind the toddler, wearing a navy polo shirt and a dark backpack with visible shoulder straps; 4) Teenager (14–17 years), standing behind him, wearing a dark navy hoodie with light drawstrings; 5) College-Age Young Adult (20–30 years), standing behind and higher, wearing a crisp white button-up shirt with open collar; 6) Confident 57-Year-Old Adult (Adult), tallest in the back upper right, salt-and-pepper hair, wearing a dark suit jacket, white dress shirt, and dark tie. Add elegant white serif labels on the left side with thin horizontal leader lines pointing to each corresponding figure, except the oldest label placed near the upper center-left with a short line toward the suited adult. Text must read exactly: "Newborn Baby
(0 months)", "Toddler
(1–2 years)", "Cheerful
School Kid
(6–8 years)", "Teenager
(14–17 years)", "College-Age
Young Adult
(20–30 years)", and "Confident
57-Year-Old
Adult (Adult)". Use emotional, nostalgic, inspiring, natural studio lighting, realistic skin and hair texture, cohesive facial resemblance across all ages, shallow depth-of-field, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no extra text.
